title: server.rs: 10-element actor query tuple
description:
LOCATION: src/server.rs lines 386-408

FINDING: The actor handler queries with sqlx::query_as::<_, (String, String, String, String, String, Option<String>, Option<String>, String, String, Option<String>)> — a 10-element tuple. This is harder to read and maintain than a named struct (equivalent to the 10-element tuple row finding from pass 1 in server.rs). The destructure names (_id, username, display_name, bio, public_key, avatar_path, header_path, created_at, metadata_json, did_key) immediately follow, indicating a struct with #[derive(sqlx::FromRow)] would be clearer.

IMPACT: Adding or reordering any column in this query requires updating both the tuple type signature and the destructure pattern in sync — a maintenance hazard.
